nodes.name: debezium.properties
nodes.summary: Debezium CDC connector properties configuring snapshot isolation mode, offset storage, and event flattening for change data capture pipelines in the Java connector node.

nodes.name: log4j2.properties
nodes.summary: Log4j2 logging configuration for the Java connector node service, defining appenders, log levels, and output patterns.

nodes.name: mongodb.properties
nodes.summary: MongoDB CDC connector properties configuring connection settings, replica set name, and Debezium change capture options for MongoDB sources.

nodes.name: mysql.properties
nodes.summary: MySQL CDC connector properties configuring Debezium connection parameters, binlog offset handling, and snapshot mode for MySQL change data capture.

nodes.name: postgres.properties
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL CDC connector properties configuring Debezium logical replication slot, publication, and snapshot mode for PostgreSQL change data capture.

nodes.name: sql_server.properties
nodes.summary: SQL Server CDC connector properties configuring Debezium SQL Server connection details, database name, and snapshot settings for change data capture.

nodes.name: validate_sql.properties
nodes.summary: SQL validation connector properties providing configuration defaults used when validating connector SQL queries before execution.
